title: astragalus longistylus
intro: Astragalus longistylus, also known as the long-styled milkvetch, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is a perennial herb native to China and other parts of Asia, traditionally used in medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-modulating properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus longistylus is commonly prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine and modern supplements.
